subject: Sandile, a small crocodile-like creature on sandy desert terrain
description: A small crocodilian creature rests low against sandy ground, its wide mouth open and showing teeth. The body is compact and low-slung, with dark dorsal markings along the back contrasting with a lighter underside. The setting is a dry desert environment with reddish-brown rock formations or canyon walls rising in the background. The creature's open mouth and wide-set eyes give it an alert, watchful posture despite its small size. The warm desert palette of tans, reds, and browns surrounds the figure.
foreground: small crocodilian creature on sandy desert ground
background: desert canyon with reddish-brown rock formations
emotion: alert, mouth open, watchful predatory stance
